scenarios.name: searches recent sessions and installed skills
scenarios.prompt: Audit my Claude Code usage patterns based on recent sessions to find automatable workflows

scenarios.name: requires evidence before proposing a new skill
scenarios.prompt: I want to audit my recent sessions and propose new automation skills for repeated workflows

scenarios.name: shows proposals before writing files
scenarios.prompt: Run an audit of my last 14 days of Claude Code sessions and propose new skills, but show me the proposals before creating any files
